title: Reliance Industries Announces Major Investment in AI and Green Energy
description: Mukesh Ambani-led Reliance Industries has announced a $10 billion investment in developing local AI models and expanding its green energy footprint in India.
content: Reliance Industries is poised to lead India's AI revolution by investing heavily in data centers and local-language LLMs. The initiative aims to provide accessible AI tools to millions of small businesses across the country...

title: ISRO Successfully Launches Next-Gen Communication Satellite
description: The Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) successfully placed the GSAT-N20 satellite into orbit, enhancing high-speed connectivity across the Indian subcontinent.
content: The launch from Sriharikota marks a significant milestone for ISRO as it moves towards more frequent commercial missions. The satellite will provide dedicated capacity for smart cities and remote communication...

title: India Wins Thrilling T20 Match Against Australia
description: A last-ball boundary secured a 3-wicket victory for India in the final match of the series, sending the home crowd at Eden Gardens into a frenzy.
content: In a match that swung back and forth, the Indian middle order held their nerve under intense pressure. The victory clinches the series 3-2 for the home side...
